programme.title: Supermarket Sweep

programme.title: Muse: Live at Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring in Nürburgring and Rock Im Park in Nuremberg are music festivals that take place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, featuring Muse.

programme.title: Metallica - Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
programme.desc: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True' and more.

programme.title: Ozzy Osbourne: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne
programme.desc: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne tells for the first time the story of his career from the founding of Black Sabbath through to solo stardom and his wider fame beyond.

programme.title: Paramore - Live at the Roundhouse
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from Madison Square Garden
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out 3-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in February 2008 when Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969.

programme.title: Paul McCartney - The Space Within US
programme.desc: Paul McCartney presents this special performance of the US Tour, made in the United States, 11 weeks and 34 shows, playing great compositions of his solo career along with some Wings and Beatles songs.

programme.title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Trey Songz talks about his humble beginnings singing for rappers Twista and P Diddy. Waka Flocka shows the world why he is still relevant in today's world of music.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The sweet smell of success was intoxicating but the death of a friend changed the way each member saw the world and the Wu. The members would all go on to have successful solo careers, and Wu-Tang's global footprint was massive.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Twenty-five years in, a family looks to cement a legacy. 'Ol Dirty is dead. Everybody has gone solo. The 'W' is fading. Yet Wu-Tang Clan, their logo, their music and their message remain indelible fixtures in the history of music and America.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Mary J Blige is a legend who is finding her place in today's music industry. She talks ups and downs and Diggy Simmons speaks on the future of rap.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Uncover a secret little loft hidden in the woods, surrounded by evergreens and ruffly green bushes and grass -- Bob Ross unveils it all!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Catch a glimpse of the sun trying to break through shades of soft crimson, shining its golden touch upon the land. Bob Ross creates another black canvas beauty today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross begins with a black canvas to create this startling rendition of a snowy landscape with the notorious lights of the northern sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's painting technique is at its best as he shows a rugged group of mountains peering down upon nature's lovely greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross enhances the beauty of this lovely mountain scene with a splashing waterfall amidst lovely fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely hike down a weathered pathway with Bob Ross and happen upon an old cabin; create a beautiful oval painting you can be proud of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an innocent creek that slices its way across a landscape of color in a setting that dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden-red glow, complete with cowboy restin' a while by the cracklin' flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a lovely mountain setting with Bob Ross, complete with leafy trees and evergreens, and step into a secluded fishing spot just perfect for casting a line.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the wonder of a late summer's day with Bob Ross where shades of lavender and golden, warm fall colors unite in an array of fabulous beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Pick up your brushes and paint along with Bob Ross - he creates a beautiful, rocky stream gently rippling through the forest mist in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Layers and layers of mountains, as far as the eye can see -- Bob Ross shows us the secret to creating a larger-than-life landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In a densely covered spot hidden far from the nearest roadway lies a softly nestled quiet little pond; Bob Ross invites you to take a peek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby -- a classic Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a relaxing walk with Bob Ross through a bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Slip away into a wondrous plush green forest where Bob Ross creates an almost invisible mountain overlooking a falling stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Enjoy the view while Nicholas Hankins paints a sleepy, slow moving mountain river as it winds around towering evergreens in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to the mountains of the north and marvel at the sight of a quaint cabin nestled into a lovely winter landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the evening light, Bob Ross creates a fast-flowing little waterfall happily running through the lush green meadow grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Share the excitement of discovering a path leading to the edge of a quiet river - in an oval! - with favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A regal vista on canvas, Bob Ross paints incredible mountains and waterfall enclosed by proud evergreens and mossy cliffs.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's a cold, cold winter day but Bob Ross offers a warm and roomy barn as refuge from the snowy blanket covering the farm.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a nice walk with Bob Ross along a peacefully flowing river and enjoy a view of gorgeous amethyst mountains and stately trees in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a pleasant walk through the forest with Bob Ross and breathe in that crisp, rain-freshened air - but be careful of those puddles!

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Abraham Lincoln tries to avoid assassination on the way to his inauguration, Francis Scott Key writes "The Star-Spangled Banner," and Edgar Allan Poe feuds with Rufus Griswold. Featuring Charlie Day, Adrianne Palicki, Jesse Plemons and Jason Ritter.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Charles Sumner gets caned on the Senate floor, Judge J. Waties Waring helps to end segregation, and a slave named Robert Smalls commandeers a Confederate warship. Featuring Patton Oswalt, Johnny Knoxville, Busy Philipps and Brandon T. Jackson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Orson Welles's "Citizen Kane" angers William Randolph Hearst, animator Ub Iwerks helps Walt Disney create Mickey Mouse, and Nancy Reagan convinces her movie-star husband to enter politics. Featuring Jack Black, Tony Hale, Nick Kroll and John Lithgow.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: James Cook "discovers" Hawaii and parties with the natives, Japanese-American Daniel Inouye fights heroically in World War II, and Eddie Aikau becomes one of the world's greatest big wave surfers. Featuring Ken Marino, Jason Mantzoukas and Steven Yeun.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Frances Cleveland becomes the youngest first lady ever, Edith Wilson runs the country after Woodrow Wilson's stroke, and Dolley Madison saves several artifacts from destruction. Featuring Courteney Cox, Bobby Moynihan, Alia Shawkat and Casey Wilson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Baron von Steuben helps train the Continental Army, John Adams and Thomas Jefferson campaign against each other for president, and Benedict Arnold betrays George Washington's army. Featuring Winona Ryder, Chris Parnell, Stephen Merchant and David Cross.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: A student tunnels beneath the Berlin Wall, Edie Windsor topples the Defense of Marriage Act, and John Wojtowicz robs a bank to pay for his wife's gender reassignment surgery.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy's doctor administers him meth for his back pain, and Dr. John C. Lilly takes LSD while studying the intelligence of dolphins.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Journalist Maurine Dallas Watkins writes a play about Chicago's infamous Murderesses' Row, and Mata Hari goes from exotic dancer to double agent during World War I.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Colonial gossip columnist James Callender winds up dead, a Hollywood producer dies on a celebrity-filled yacht, and Ken McElroy is murdered after terrorizing a Missouri town.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Larry Walters pilots a balloon-suspended lawn chair, Phineas Gage survives an iron rod to the brain, and the Greenbrier Ghost's testimony is used in court.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Lead Belly records songs with John Lomax that change the face of music, John Lennon and Yoko Ono almost get deported, and Sam Cooke writes "A Change Is Gonna Come."

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Hedy Lamarr designs the first modern airplane wing, Eartha Kitt's activism provokes the ire of Lady Bird Johnson, and Alexis Pulaski's poodle becomes a huge star.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Forest service ranger Ed Pulaski saves 40 men from a forest fire, and Ted Patrick rescues teenagers from the psychological grip of the Children of God cult.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Martha Mitchell leaks the Watergate scandal to the press before Deep Throat does, and the Citizens' Commission to Investigate the FBI stages an epic break-in.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Marina Raskova forms an all-women air force regiment to fight Nazis in World War II, and smuggler James J. Andrews hijacks a Confederate train for the Union.

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: When the guys take three young trainees under their wing, the office prank situation gets seriously out of hand.

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: Bill and Montez transport a mysterious briefcase through the Chinatown underworld.

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: When Alice makes the office sell a terrible product that her dad invented, the guys discover they can use it as a cover to deal weed over the phone.

programme.title: Workaholics

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: The office holds a remote-controlled car race, and Blake adopts a mouse.

programme.title: Workaholics

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: The guys try to get rid of a motivational speaker when she begins interfering with a beloved office awards show.

programme.title: Workaholics

programme.title: Workaholics

programme.title: MST3K Shorts

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cruel collage prank comes back to haunt four young women in later life. Although Amanda had almost forgotten it, a recent letter brings back the unpleasant memory.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble, pursued by the local police, takes refuge with a widow and her young son and makes an enemy of her suitor.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Surprise, surprise! While investigating the murder of a call-girl, Dr. Sloan is caught in the middle of a vice raid!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan becomes involved in more than politics when he accepts an invitation to attend an election campaign party. A face in a crowd of well-wishers awakens old memories for Mayor Ridgeway's wife, Lauren, with murderous results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker gets a sinking feeling in his guts when, after arresting two guys for trying to rob a club and shooting the bartender, Alex sets them free and won't give them a reason as to why it all happened.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When a woman goes against the State Police's beliefs that her father was a casualty of his own drunk driving, Walker believes her and stumbles across an illegal ring of toxic dumpers.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy

programme.title: Futureworld

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: People accuse their loved ones of being emotionless impostors. At first, Dr. Bennell tries to convince them they’re wrong, but they’re not. Plant-like extraterrestrials have invaded Earth, taking possession of their souls while they sleep.

programme.title: It! The Terror From Beyond Space
programme.desc: The survivor of a space expedition claims his crew was killed by an alien creature. The rescue captain dismisses the explanation only to find that a creature has stowed away on the spacecraft and begins to hunt the human hosts.

programme.title: Invaders From Mars
programme.desc: In the early 1950s, Cold War tensions and the burgeoning space race created a heady mix of paranoia and unbridled creativity as filmmakers speculated as to the marvels - and horrors - that lay beyond the stars.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: An impending collision with a runaway star signals the destruction of Earth. As doomsday approaches, people race against time and the panic of those who will be left behind.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds (1953)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.desc: Massive bloodsucking monsters are at large in this Drive-in schlock classic from producers Roger and Gene Corman. Basically, its a bunch of actors in plastic costumes, but director Bernard Kowalski made the most of his small budget.

programme.title: The Haunted Palace
programme.desc: In 1765, a warlock is burned at the stake. Now, a century later, his great-great-grandson (Vincent Price) inherits the family mansion and falls under his ancestor's evil spell. And soon all the horrors of the past return to The Haunted Palace!

programme.title: The Raven (1963)
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum (1961)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: War of the Worlds

programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: The Cabin in the Woods

programme.desc: Trapped townspeople (Thomas Jane, Marcia Gay Harden, Laurie Holden) face monsters inside and out after a supernatural fog engulfs their Maine community.

programme.title: The Quiet Ones
programme.desc: A university professor and a team of students conduct an experiment on a young woman, uncovering terrifyingly dark, unexpected forces in the process.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A misfit boy (Kodi Smit-McPhee) suspects that his only friend (Chloë Grace Moretz), an eerie child who only appears at night, is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.desc: On Halloween 1968, Stella and her two friends meet a mysterious drifter, Ramón, and uncover a sinister notebook of stories.

programme.desc: On a Mississippi River island, two young friends (Tye Sheridan, Jacob Lofland) encounter a fugitive (Matthew McConaughey) whose wild tales about a beautiful woman and a line of bounty hunters come true.

programme.title: Joe
programme.desc: The rough-hewn boss (Nicolas Cage) of a lumber crew courts trouble when he steps in to protect the youngest member (Tye Sheridan) of his team from an abusive father.

programme.title: In The Mood For Love
programme.desc: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.

programme.title: The Grandmaster

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Encino Man
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.desc: Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Two figure skating rivals are banned from the sport after a brawl over the gold medal. Joining forces, they find a loophole in the rules that allows them to skate again... as a pair!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover they're identical twins and plot to reunite their eccentric divorced parents. A riotously funny and debaucherous musical starring Megan Thee Stallion, Nathan Lane, Megan Mullally, and Bowen Yang.

programme.title: The Death of Dick Long
programme.desc: In small-town Alabama, Zeke & Earl scramble to cover up the unlikely (and, in most states, highly illegal) events that led to their friend's death, as they try to dodge their families, the cops, and one horrified medical examiner.

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: Featuring never-before-seen footage that's outrageously funny! The creators and star of Borat bring you the hilarious comedy about what happens when the world's worst dictator is stuck in New York.

programme.title: The Stoned Age
programme.desc: Joe and Hubbs are a pair of rockers who are on a quest for 'chicks'. This is the tale of their adventures over one night.

programme.title: Youth in Revolt
programme.desc: While his trailer trash parents teeter on the edge of divorce, a 14-year-old boy sets his sights on his dream girl, hoping that she'll be the one to take away his virginity.

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: After making their way through high school (twice), big changes are in store for officers Schmidt (Jonah Hill) and Jenko (Channing Tatum) when they go deep undercover at a local college.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind, or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.desc: If you've always wanted to know what a baby thinks of the world around him, you finally have your chance. With Bruce Willis supplying the voice of Mikey's thoughts, this is one baby who says exactly what's on his mind. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: John Travolta and Kirstie Alley return in this charming sequel to the $100 million box-office smash. Also starring the voices of Bruce Willis as Mikey, Rosanne Barr as his new baby sister and Mel Brooks as the voice of Mr. Toilet Man.

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: In this heartfelt comedy starring Tom Hanks, a young boy discovers adulthood isn't all it's cracked up to be when his wish to be a grown-up magically comes true.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.desc: Unforgettable and powerful, this winner of 9 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, Best Director (Anthony Minghella) and Best Supporting Actress (Juliette Binoche) unfolds an incredible tale of passion, intrigue, and adventure.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Revolver
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: A jury fixer plays a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a jury member and a mysterious outsider who both offer to 'deliver' the verdict to the highest bidder. Soon, lives and millions of dollars are at stake in this pulse-pounder filled with twists and turns.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub is heading for the U.S. coast; however, one CIA analyst thinks the captain will defect the submarine, and he only has hours to prove it.

programme.title: Uncut Gems

programme.title: Hush
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: Owen, an overlooked and bullied boy, finds love and revenge through Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz of KICK-ASS), a beautiful but peculiar girl who turns out to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Ruins
programme.desc: "The Ruins" follows a group of friends who become entangled in a struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Based on the terrifying novel by Stephen King... After the Creed family moves to rural Maine, they stumble upon an ancient burial ground with sinister powers. When tragedy strikes, a perilous chain of events unleashes an unfathomable evil.

programme.title: Down a Dark Hall

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: WWII: On the Edge of the Abyss
